states.name: Wantonwitch
states.title: Wantonwitch
states.description: Many dream of entering Obscura Academy, one of Westland's most historical magic academies. However many feel their experience at the school does not quite live up to their expectations.

states.name: Wantonwitch
states.title: Wantonwitch
states.description: Obscura dropouts are not rare, and many of them have found inventive ways to use the skills they learned during their student years. While not always on the up and up, no one can deny their creativity and pluck.
